entries.summary: Phase 8 completed: 14 code quality fixes implemented. Fixed false positive documentation, duplicate thread start, path validation, subprocess handling, path comparison, lazy import caching, LOCALAPPDATA caching, log level, magic numbers, RRF docstring, file encoding, stop words constant, error recovery, and file size limits.
top_rejection_reasons: Missing error handling for env var parsing
Incomplete QA gates - user had to remind about skipped gates
lessons_learned: Environment variable parsing needs try/except for robust error handling
Path comparisons should use is_relative_to instead of substring matching
Module-level constants prevent inline recreation of immutable data
